title: Protecting children from family violence.
subject: CHILDREN AND MINORS; Crimes Against Children
COURTS; Generally
COURTS; Guardianships and Conservatorships
COURTS; Judges
CRIMINAL LAW AND PROCEDURE; Abuse and Domestic Violence (Excluding Animals)
MARRIAGE AND FAMILY LAW; Child Support, Custody, and Visitation

abstracts.abstract: Amends the definition of "domestic or family violence" to include additional acts or behaviors that are not necessarily physical. Prohibits a court from returning certain children to the child's parent, guardian, or custodian unless appropriate safety conditions are ordered. Requires the office of judicial administration to develop a training program, which must include certain topics relating to domestic or family violence. Makes technical and conforming changes.

actions.description: First reading: referred to Committee on Family and Children Services
